description_long: This is a slim, black Toshiba laptop with a matte finish and a full-sized keyboard. The screen is open and displays a 3D modeling application, with various interface elements and a rendered laptop model visible. The laptop's lid features the Toshiba logo in white, positioned in the lower left corner. The keyboard includes a function row and a large touchpad centered below the spacebar. The chassis appears to be constructed primarily from plastic with some metallic elements, and the device is lightweight and portable. Ports and connectors are minimally visible, suggesting a streamlined design typical of modern laptops.
description: A slim, black Toshiba laptop with a matte finish, open screen displaying a 3D modeling application, and a full-sized keyboard with a centered touchpad.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a 3D modeling application, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and partially visible keyboard and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed laptop lid with the Toshiba logo in the lower left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and edge of the open screen and keyboard.
attribute_brand_logo: The Toshiba logo is visible on the lower left corner of the laptop lid, in white, with a simple sans-serif font.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a 3D modeling application with visible interface elements and a rendered model.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row and a large touchpad below the spacebar; no numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: A small sticker is visible on the left palm rest area, featuring a blue and white design, likely indicating hardware or certification.
